firstDialogue:
Detective:
Pardon me? Young Lady? Are you well?

Dizzy Npc:
They…  will know… his name

Detective:
(That phrase is similar to the messages left around in the city.)

Detective:
(Maybe she knows something about the disappearances, who's behind this?)

Detective:
Excuse me miss, but do you-

Detective:
(I don’t think I’m getting through to her..she is moving rythmically to no music)

Detective:
(Maybe a little music and presuasion will help)
hintDialogue:
Undizzy Npc:
ugghhh.. Huh? Where am I? Why am I out here in this alley?

Detective:
I would also like to know that…

Detective:
You seemed to have been under some kind of… mind control?

Undizzy Npc:
W-what? Who are you?

Detective:
I am the Dectective! Just the Dective

Detective:
Things have been a bit strange in the city lately.

Detective:
There’s been many disappearances recently

Detective:
and I’m on the case uncovering the whereabouts of who’s behind all of this.

Detective:
You mentioned the phrase “They will know his name” while you were dazed,

Detective:
which is similar to the evidence left behind all around hte city where the missing were last seen

Detective:
So I can only deduce that he is involved in both the disappearances and what happened to you

Undizzy Npc:
“They will know his name”, that sounds… kinda familiar

Detective:
Huh?

Undizzy Npc:
My head still really fuzzy, but I think I remember hearing someone repeating that to me,

Undizzy Npc:
and that DOOR behind me, I remember the area filled with loud music

Undizzy Npc:
Before I ended up here at least…

Detective:
Do you know where and why you went to that area?

Undizzy Npc:
Not exactly… but to me it looked like it was underground

Detective:
Underground… inconcievable…

Detective:
Do you know what this suspect looked like?

Undizzy Npc:
No not at all. Sorry, you can try out the DOOR I just unlocked it

Detective:
Ok, thanks for the info.

Detective:
I’ll make sure whoever is doing this will be caught and put to justice

Undizzy:
Thank you, good luck!
